category_sources: source_facts.description says file management automation tool; official README describes organize as an open-source command-line alternative to Hazel/File Juggler: https://github.com/tfeldmann/organize
display_name_sources: Official repository title and README use organize; source_facts.executable is organize: https://github.com/tfeldmann/organize
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository links to full documentation at Read the Docs: https://github.com/tfeldmann/organize
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository URL: https://github.com/tfeldmann/organize
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README describe automated sorting, renaming, moving, and rule-based file management.
